closureConditions: A lockdown is triggered if a zone density exceeds 2.0 p/m² for over 15 seconds.
Emergency gate closure is initiated if panic signals indicate fire, weapon, active threat, or severe stampede risk.
Medical dispatch is requested immediately for active CPR, unconscious persons, or crushing injuries.

incidentPatterns.description: Crowd congestion leading to chest compression and breathing difficulty. Medical team deployment is critical. Grounding keywords: crushed, suffocating, help, breathing, CPR.
Sudden egress surge leading to falls and trampling risk. Grounding keywords: stampede, trampled, running, panic, correria, pânico.
Localized smoke or fire detection forcing evacuation. Grounding keywords: fire, smoke, burning, fogo, fumaça.
Physical violence, fights, or presence of weapons requiring tactical response and gate lockouts. Grounding keywords: weapon, shooter, gun, knife, fight, arma, briga.
Standard audience conversations, comments on crowd flow slowness or music. Non-emergency. Grounding keywords: concert, slow, show, legal.
